channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Reza Pahlavi pledges to ‘make Iran great again’ at 2026 CPAC conference
item.description: Iranian opposition leader calls on Trump administration to 'stay the course' as the US and Israel wage war on Iran.

item.title: Pakistan secures Iran deal to send 20 ships through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Islamabad's diplomatic push bears fruit as the world watches for signs of a broader breakthrough.

item.title: Kuwait airport hit by Iranian drone strikes
item.description: Thick, black smoke rose from Kuwait International Airport Saturday after suspected Iranian drone strikes caused damage.

item.title: Could Ukraine’s drone expertise serve Gulf countries?
item.description: Gulf nations seek new defence partnerships as Iran war escalates.

item.title: Missiles hit southern Israeli city of Eilat
item.description: Israeli social media posts show a strike in the Israeli city of Eilat.

item.title: As war rages, Iranian politicians push for exit from nuclear weapons treaty
item.description: While US-Israeli attacks hit key infrastructure, hardliners demand withdrawal from Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty.

item.title: Three journalists killed in Israeli strike on marked press car in Lebanon
item.description: Israeli attack on clearly marked press car kills reporters as WHO laments deadly day for paramedics.

item.title: One month in, disapproval high but US lawmakers take no action on Iran war
item.description: Republicans and Democrats remain entrenched despite public polling showing dismay over war, petrol prices.

item.title: Iran warns neighbours not to let ‘enemies run the war’ from their land
item.description: President Pezeshkian's warning is the latest by Tehran to neighbours not to allow their territory to be used in the war.

item.title: At least 15 US troops wounded in Iran strike on Saudi airbase: Reports
item.description: At least five soldiers are reported in serious condition following Iran attack that damaged refuelling aircraft.
